name: Fresh Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash asparagus spears and trim off the tough ends.
2. Place the asparagus in boiling salted water and cook until tender, about 7 to 10 minutes.
3. Drain off the liquid.
4. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle freshly grated cheese over the butter and mix well.
6. Spoon the mixture over the asparagus.
7. Garnish with sliced hard boiled egg.
